name: vendor-block-check
description: Check whether a vendor is blocked. Agent must surface the block status + reason verbatim from the tool, not invent it.
expected_behavior: Calls vendor-lookup (sap_search_vendors_by_name then sap_get_vendor for V-1201). Surfaces that the vendor is blocked_for_posting=true with reason 'Quality hold pending QA dispute (May 2026)'. Does not invent additional context. Mentions YTD spend ($920,000) and credit rating (BB).
